blended.narrative: Loon Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,817 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.2" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
